modes.description: No authentication on gateway or controller. Trusted LAN only.
HTTP Basic Auth on the controller. No gateway-level auth. Good for local networks with minimal security.
Authelia forward-auth via Envoy ext_authz. Single sign-on with local accounts, OIDC upstream, or LDAP. Lightweight (single Go binary).
Authentik forward-auth via Envoy ext_authz. Full identity provider with OIDC/SAML federation. Heavier resource usage (~1GB RAM).
